title: haplocoelum foliolosum subsp. mombasense
intro: Haplocoelum foliolosum subsp. mombasense is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, known for its medicinal and culinary uses. It is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are administered to alleviate various health issues. The plant's leaves and bark are often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health problems.
